title: WordCamp Asia 2026 – Recap from Mumbai
content:
Did you know… 🤓

WordCamp Asia 2026 wrapped up in Mumbai — 2,281 attendees, three tracks, three days. Contributor Day brought 1,500+ participants to 38 tables, Polyglots suggested 7,000+ strings.

Mary Hubbard closed with a look ahead: WordPress 7.0, real-time collaboration, and global contributor growth are shaping what comes next.
